decks.description: A aggressive cat-focused deck with efficient small creatures and combat tricks, featuring lions and leonins with spells that protect and pump your creatures.
A creature-heavy deck focused on Unicorns and Pegasus, featuring evasive flyers and small efficient creatures that deal combat damage while protecting against removal.
A flying-focused deck with angels and support spells that provide removal and protection, centered around Giada as a key lord.
An angel-focused deck with evasive flyers and anthem effects that buff the team while providing removal through Angelic Edict.
Small efficient creatures with pump spells that enhance combat and create tactical advantages through tricks and tricks.
Aggressive small creatures with instant-speed combat tricks and support spells that create tempo advantages and evasion.
Token generation and small creature synergy with anthem effects. The deck creates multiple tokens and leverages cards that reward playing creatures.
Token generation and anthem effects with mass token creation from spells. The deck focuses on creating multiple tokens and buffing them with convoke and populate mechanics.
Life gain focused deck with creatures that benefit from gaining life and spells to restore health. Features multiple Ajani's Pridemates and healing instants to grow threats while staying healthy.
A life gain deck with creatures that synergize with gaining life and protection spells. Uses Valkyrie Harbinger and Pridemates alongside removal and defensive instants.
A life gain strategy with Righteous Valkyrie as a payoff for gaining life, combined with creatures and instant-speed tricks to protect and heal.
Life gain deck featuring Felidar Sovereign and Rhox Faithmender as payoffs for accumulating life total. Combines efficient life-gain creatures with healing instants.
Focused on small defensive creatures and planeswalker support with token generation and protection spells.
Features creature enhancement and token generation with Basri synergies, creating growing threats.
Emphasizes small creatures with enter-the-battlefield effects that generate tokens and support.
Focuses on +1/+1 counter synergies with lords and anthem effects that boost the team.
Equipment-focused deck with artifact weapons to equip smaller creatures for combat advantage.
Equipment-heavy strategy featuring creatures that benefit from equipped artifacts and gain value from equipment triggers.
Equipment deck with creatures that synergize with equipped artifacts to create board pressure and card value.
Equipment-focused aggro deck with creatures designed to be equipped and create combat advantage through artifacts.

This deck focuses on enchantment synergies with creatures that benefit from enchantments being cast and in play. The deck plays creatures that draw value from enchantments while running multiple aura effects.

This deck combines enchantment-focused creatures with removal and utility enchantments. It features creatures that synergize with enchantments while maintaining a good mix of defensive and offensive auras.

This enchantment-heavy deck leverages creatures that generate value from enchantments entering the battlefield. It includes Starfield Mystic for enchantment cost reduction and focuses on building board presence through aura effects.
This deck centers on enchantment synergies with Archon of Sun's Grace generating tokens and aura effects. It combines creatures that benefit from enchantments with removal and buff auras.
A spell-heavy illusion deck focused on evasive creatures and instant-speed tricks to control the board with protective effects and select removal.
An evasive creature-focused deck with Ninjas and sneaky creatures that rewards attacking and ninjutsu strategies, complemented by protective instants and enchantments.
A creature-heavy deck focused on small coastal creatures with card advantage and tempo plays through instants and enchantments.
A coastal creature deck with blue flyers and utility creatures, featuring efficient creature base with draw spells for card advantage.
A graveyard-focused spell-heavy deck that fills your graveyard for value with discard outlets and self-mill effects.
A graveyard-synergy deck with token generation and self-mill, leveraging cards that benefit from a full graveyard.
Spell-heavy deck focused on wizard creatures that synergize with instants and sorceries, providing card draw and control.
Spell-heavy wizard deck with additional card draw and instant speed disruption, creating a versatile control strategy.
Flying-focused deck with evasive creatures and utility spells that leverage air superiority.
Flying creatures with card draw and buff effects that dominate the air while building card advantage.
Planeswalker-supported flying aggression with efficient creatures and card draw that controls the skies.
Evasive flying creatures with theft effects and flexible instant-speed tricks for aggressive aerial advantage.
Fast creatures with tempo-like instant tricks and enchantments to control the board.
Creature-heavy deck with instant-speed responses and board control through enchantments.
Interactive deck with instant-speed tricks and creatures that can handle surprise combat situations.
Instant-heavy deck focused on reactive spells and creatures that enable tempo plays.
Spell-heavy deck that draws cards and triggers card draw synergies with creatures that reward drawing cards.
Card draw-focused deck that benefits from drawing cards with enchantments and creatures that trigger on card draw.
Enchantment-heavy card draw deck that uses knowledge triggers and a Sphinx to draw extra cards each turn.
Kraken-focused card draw deck that builds up Nadir and Tolarian Kraken with blue spells while generating card advantage.
Artifact-focused deck with thopter generation and artifact synergies, using small efficient artifacts and creatures that benefit from artifacts.
Artifact-heavy deck with blue creature synergies, leveraging artifacts and creatures that create value from artifacts in play.
Affinity-based artifact deck with card draw synergies, featuring creatures that benefit from artifacts and efficient spellcasting.
Artifact synergy deck with flexible interactive instants, combining artifact creatures with control elements for adaptive gameplay.
A poison and creature-focused deck that uses venomous creatures and removal spells to control the board while dealing damage through snake creatures.
A deck focused on powerful, evasive creatures and efficient removal. Features card draw and disruption through Dark Confidant and targeted instant-speed answers.

A treasure-generating deck that creates tokens by sacrificing creatures and then cashing them in for value. The deck synergizes death triggers with treasure production to generate card advantage and mana.

A treasure-focused deck that generates valuable tokens through creature death triggers and sacrifice outlets. The deck uses treasures to fuel spell casting and create multiple death triggers for card advantage.
Creature-focused deck with an insect/pest theme that uses sacrificial mechanics. The deck leverages small creatures like swarms and grubs with sacrifice outlets like Nantuko Husk and removal spells.

Another insect/pest-themed deck with sacrifice synergies and some graveyard interaction. This version includes an enchantment for added value and a slightly different creature mix to create pest tokens and payoffs.
A cleric-focused deck with life drain effects and removal, using creatures that trigger death mechanics and spells to control the board.
A cleric-themed deck built around creature removal and sacrifice synergies, with efficient clerics and black removal spells.
A clerics deck with life loss effects and creature removal, featuring black creatures that punish opponents and control threats.

cards.title: Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose

decks.description: A clerics deck that generates tokens and uses sacrifice outlets, with powerful clerics and instant-speed removal for board control.

cards.title: Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose

decks.description: Vampire-focused deck with life gain synergies and efficient removal through creatures like Sangromancer that reward dealing damage.
Aggressive vampire deck with flying creatures and direct damage effects that pressure opponents while gaining life through vampire abilities.
Vampire lord deck featuring powerful creatures like Necropolis Regent that grow in power while draining opponents through evasive attackers.
Life drain focused vampire deck with creatures that provide evasion and efficiency, supported by life gain and targeted removal spells.

This deck focuses on reanimation and graveyard synergies, using creatures that benefit from creatures in the graveyard and spells that pull creatures back from the yard to deal damage and control the board.
This deck leverages graveyard recursion and reanimation effects, using creatures that interact with the graveyard to generate value and protect the board through sacrificial mechanics.
This deck uses reanimation and graveyard recursion to repeatedly bring creatures back from the dead, creating a resilient engine that generates value from creature deaths.
This deck features powerful reanimation with a planeswalker that can bring creatures back, combined with creatures that create value and can be recast from the graveyard multiple times.
A deck focused on creatures that trigger on death effects, generating value through sacrifice and triggers from Morbid Opportunist and Falkenrath Noble.
A creature-heavy deck leveraging death triggers and sacrifice outlets with removal spells to control the board while generating value.
A deck built around creatures with death-trigger effects and flexible removal, creating value while controlling the board with instant-speed interaction.
A graveyard-focused deck that uses sacrifice outlets and death triggers to generate tokens and value while rebuilding creatures from the yard.

A goblin-focused deck that leverages token generation and multiplier effects to create a wide board presence. The deck uses goblin tokens and creatures with duplicate effects to overwhelm opponents with numbers.
An aggressive burn-focused deck with small creatures that benefit from instant and sorcery spells, emphasizing direct damage to the opponent.
A creature-focused deck built around powerful dragons and dragon synergies, with direct damage spells for finishing opponents.
A dragon-centered deck with a planeswalker for additional value, focusing on flying threats and direct dragon damage.
A spell-heavy deck that triggers payoff creatures whenever instant and sorcery spells are cast, generating value through card abilities like Young Pyromancer and Guttersnipe.
A spell-focused deck that benefits from instant and sorcery spells cast, with creatures that generate tokens and deal damage when spells are played.
Aggressive creature-focused deck with combat-oriented warriors and a mix of direct damage and combat pump spells to overwhelm opponents.
A warrior-based aggressive deck featuring intimidating creatures and removal spells to dominate combat and control the board through creature power.
Spell-heavy deck with prowess creatures that reward casting instants and sorceries for combat damage.
Spell-focused aggro deck with creatures that trigger off spells and low-cost pump effects for quick damage.
Prowess-heavy aggro with copy effects creating token copies that grow from spellcasting.
Spell-casting aggro with creatures that trigger on spells and flashback effects for card advantage.
Small aggressive goblins with direct damage spells that create early pressure and burn the opponent down quickly.
An aggressive goblin swarm strategy with small creatures and burn spells to deal rapid damage to opponents.
Token-generating goblins led by Krenko that create multiple creatures while applying early pressure with burn spells.
A goblin-focused deck with aggressive creatures and targeted burn spells designed to overwhelm opponents early.
An aggressive vampire deck that deals damage through creature attacks and removal spells, with life gain synergies.
A vampire-focused aggro deck with efficient creatures and direct damage spells for quick wins.
A vampire aggro strategy featuring aggressive creatures with combat tricks and removal for controlling the board.
A fast vampire deck with evasive creatures and instant-speed removal for early pressure and combat tricks.
Aggressive red deck focused on haste creatures and combat tricks to overwhelm opponents quickly.
Red aggressive deck with haste and aggressive creatures backed by combat tricks and enchantments.
Combat-focused red deck using haste creatures and triggered abilities to deal damage through combat.
Red aggro deck with haste creatures and combat tricks that synergize with triggered abilities for extra damage.
Food-focused deck with creatures that generate and consume food tokens for value and advantage.

A creature-focused deck that uses keywords and permanent effects with cards like Kodama of the West Tree and Audacity to strengthen creatures over time, employing protection spells to keep threats alive.
Token and creature swarm strategy with saprolings and powerful team buff instants like Might of the Masses.
Fungal token generation deck featuring Verdeloth the Ancient and saproling-producing spells for a growing creature army.
A deck focused on large creatures with beast synergies, using targeted removal and mana acceleration spells to fuel a creature-heavy strategy.
A planeswalker-backed beast deck that combines Garruk's creature-generating abilities with a strong core of beasts and token synergies for aggressive growth.
A creature-focused deck with large dinosaurs and mana acceleration, powered by efficient removal and ramp spells to play powerful creatures early.
A dinosaur-heavy deck with large creatures and instant-speed combat tricks to dominate the board with oversized threats.
A counters-focused deck with a Planeswalker that upgrades creatures with +1/+1 counters while providing versatile creature and combat support.
A versatile green deck with ooze and creature synergies, using instant-speed buffs and combat tricks to enhance creatures.
A Planeswalker-supported creatures deck with counters and growth payoffs, featuring both defensive and aggressive options.
A creature-heavy deck with counters payoffs and anthem effects, using Primeval Bounty to generate value from creature enters and growth.
Creature-focused deck with explore mechanics and utility creatures that ramp and generate value through land discovery.
Land-focused explorer deck that leverages exploration mechanics and landfall triggers with creatures that reward land discovery.
Beast-focused explorer deck that combines creature synergies with exploration and land discovery effects.
Scout and discover deck with explore mechanics that tutor creatures and generate value from land-based synergies.
Small efficient elves with card draw and combat tricks to establish board presence and apply pressure.
Elf lords and token generators creating a growing army of elves with combat synergies.
Mana-generating elves led by Marwyn to quickly power up bigger threats and overwhelming opponent resources.
Planeswalker-supported elf synergies with token generation and power-ups for a versatile aggressive strategy.
Landfall-focused deck that gains value whenever lands enter the battlefield, triggering creatures like Lotus Cobra and Undergrowth Champion to grow stronger.
Green creatures that benefit from landfall triggers, with Ancient Greenwarden enabling repeated land interactions and growth.
Landfall creatures that grow incrementally whenever lands enter play, supported by land ramp spells to trigger multiple landfall effects.
Aggressive landfall deck with evasion and power-boosting creatures that generate multiple landfall triggers for exponential damage output.
A cascade-focused deck that fills the board with creatures and uses instants to trigger cascading effects for additional value.
